title: The Secret of the Firstborn #mahabharata #shorts
description: On the eve of the great war, a mother makes a desperate plea to the son she abandoned. A tragic motion comic from the Mahabharata. #Karna #Kunti #Epic #Shorts

scenes.narration: On the eve of the great war, a mother sought out the warrior she had abandoned.
scenes.image_prompt: A single-panel portrait comic scene in warm vintage sepia watercolor and pencil style. Twilight by a tranquil river. Kunti (an older royal woman, graceful, wearing a rich dark-toned silk sari and traditional gold jewelry) steps hesitantly toward the riverbank. Her expression is sorrowful. Leave empty space at the top.

comic_dialogues.text: Karna... I have carried a painful truth in my soul for a lifetime.

scenes.narration: The warrior turned, his legendary armor gleaming in the fading light.
scenes.image_prompt: A single-panel portrait comic scene in warm vintage sepia watercolor and pencil style. Close up of Karna (a rugged warrior with long untamed dark hair, wearing battered sun-gold chest armor over maroon cloth). He looks respectful but cold and aloof. Leave empty space at the bottom right.

comic_dialogues.text: You are the queen mother of my enemies. What truth could you possibly offer me now?

scenes.narration: With tears in her eyes, Kunti spoke the words that could change history.
scenes.image_prompt: A single-panel portrait comic scene in warm vintage sepia watercolor and pencil style. Close up of Kunti (older royal woman, dark silk sari) weeping softly, reaching a hand out desperately. Leave empty space at the top left.

comic_dialogues.text: You are not a charioteer's son. You are my firstborn. The eldest Pandava. Please, do not fight your own brothers tomorrow.

scenes.narration: The archer stood in stunned silence, before his heart hardened with tragic loyalty.
scenes.image_prompt: A single-panel portrait comic scene in warm vintage sepia watercolor and pencil style. Karna (rugged, long dark hair, sun-gold armor) looking away toward the horizon, his face a mix of deep pain and immovable resolve. The river flows behind him. Leave empty space at the bottom left.

comic_dialogues.text: Where was this mother when the world mocked me? Duryodhana gave me honor when I had none. I cannot betray him.

scenes.narration: Though his heart wept, the warrior made a single, solemn vow.
scenes.image_prompt: A single-panel portrait comic scene in warm vintage sepia watercolor and pencil style. Karna (sun-gold armor) and Kunti (dark silk sari) standing facing each other in silhouette against the dying sun over the river. Dramatic, tragic atmosphere. Leave empty space at the top.

comic_dialogues.text: I will spare your other sons. But Arjuna and I must fight. Tomorrow, you will still have five sons, no matter who falls.
